# Declare & Believe — declareandbelieve.com

> A free, faith-based mind-renewal app built on Romans 12:2: "Be transformed by the
> renewing of your mind." You name what is weighing on you — anxiety, shame, grief,
> burnout, and more than thirty other struggles — and receive Scripture for that
> exact moment: a verse, a short reflection, "I am" declarations to speak aloud,
> and a personal prayer. Fully available in English and Spanish (Spanish Scripture
> quoted from the Reina-Valera 1909). Free for everyone, no ads, no data selling.

## Core experience
- [Receive a word now](https://declareandbelieve.com/today/): name a struggle, receive Scripture, declarations, and a prayer
- [The Word](https://declareandbelieve.com/word/): full Bible reader — NKJV, NIV, NLT, KJV, WEB, ASV, and Reina-Valera 1909 (Español), side-by-side compare and search
- [The Journey](https://declareandbelieve.com/journey/): a guided 5-day walk out of one struggle, one day at a time
- [How it works](https://declareandbelieve.com/welcome)
- [About / why we built it](https://declareandbelieve.com/about)

## Struggle guides (English)
- [All struggles](https://declareandbelieve.com/struggles)
- [Anxiety](https://declareandbelieve.com/anxiety): Bible Verses for Anxiety: Real Peace for a Worried Mind
- [Anger](https://declareandbelieve.com/anger): What the Bible Says About Anger and Losing Your Temper
- [Stress & Burnout](https://declareandbelieve.com/burnout): Christian Burnout: Bible Verses, Rest, and Grace When You're Running on Empty
- [Church hurt](https://declareandbelieve.com/church-hurt): Church Hurt: Healing When You're Wounded in God's House
- [Depression](https://declareandbelieve.com/depression): Depression and Faith: Hope When the Dark Won't Lift
- [Doubt](https://declareandbelieve.com/doubt): What Does the Bible Say About Doubt and Shaky Faith?
- [Failure](https://declareandbelieve.com/failure): Feeling Like a Failure? Who God Says You Really Are
- [Financial pressure](https://declareandbelieve.com/financial-pressure): Bible Verses for Financial Stress and Money Worry
- [Grief](https://declareandbelieve.com/grief): Bible Verses for Grief: Comfort When Someone Is Gone
- [Loneliness](https://declareandbelieve.com/loneliness): Loneliness and Faith: You Are Fully Known by God
- [Marriage](https://declareandbelieve.com/marriage): When Your Marriage Is Falling Apart: Hope and Scripture
- [Overthinking](https://declareandbelieve.com/overthinking): How to Stop Overthinking as a Christian: Bible Verses, Prayer, and a Renewed Mind
- [Purpose](https://declareandbelieve.com/purpose): Feeling Lost? Finding Your God-Given Purpose
- [Rejection](https://declareandbelieve.com/rejection): Bible Verses for Rejection: When You Feel Unwanted
- [Parental abandonment](https://declareandbelieve.com/parental-abandonment): Bible Verses for Parental Abandonment
- [Feeling unloved in marriage](https://declareandbelieve.com/feeling-unloved-in-marriage): Bible Verses for Feeling Unloved in Marriage
- [Shame](https://declareandbelieve.com/shame): Bible Verses for Shame and Guilt: Freedom From Hiding
- [Unforgiveness](https://declareandbelieve.com/unforgiveness): How to Forgive When You Can't Let Go of the Hurt

## Guías de luchas (Español)
- [Todas las luchas](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/luchas)
- [Ansiedad](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/ansiedad): Versículos para la Ansiedad: Paz Real para una Mente Inquieta
- [Ira](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/ira): Lo Que la Biblia Dice Sobre la Ira y Perder los Estribos
- [Estrés y agotamiento](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/estres-y-agotamiento): Agotamiento Cristiano: Versículos, Descanso y Gracia Cuando Estás Sin Fuerzas
- [Heridas de la iglesia](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/heridas-de-la-iglesia): Heridas de la Iglesia: Qué Dice Dios Cuando Te Lastiman en Su Casa
- [Depresión](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/depresion): Versículos para la Depresión: Esperanza Cuando la Oscuridad No Se Va
- [Duda](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/duda): Lo Que la Biblia Dice Sobre la Duda y la Fe Vacilante
- [Fracaso](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/fracaso): ¿Te Sientes un Fracaso? Quién Dice Dios Que Eres en Verdad
- [Presión financiera](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/presion-financiera): Versículos Bíblicos para el Estrés Financiero y la Preocupación por el Dinero
- [Duelo](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/duelo): Versículos para el Duelo: Consuelo Cuando Alguien Se Ha Ido
- [Soledad](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/soledad): Versículos para la Soledad: Dios Te Conoce por Tu Nombre
- [Matrimonio](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/matrimonio): Cuando Tu Matrimonio Se Está Cayendo a Pedazos: Esperanza y Escritura
- [Sobrepensar](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/sobrepensar): Cómo Dejar de Pensar de Más Como Cristiano: Versículos, Oración y una Mente Renovada
- [Propósito](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/proposito): ¿Te Sientes Perdido? Encontrar el Propósito Que Dios Te Dio
- [Rechazo](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/rechazo): Versículos Bíblicos sobre el Rechazo
- [Abandono de padres](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/abandono-de-padres): Versículos Bíblicos sobre el Abandono de los Padres
- [No amado en el matrimonio](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/no-amado-en-el-matrimonio): Versículos Bíblicos para Sentirse No Amado en el Matrimonio
- [Vergüenza](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/verguenza): Versículos Bíblicos para la Vergüenza y la Culpa: Libertad de Esconderse
- [Falta de perdón](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/falta-de-perdon): Cómo Perdonar Cuando No Puedes Soltar el Dolor
- [Cómo funciona](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/bienvenido) · [Acerca de](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/acerca) · [Ayuda](https://declareandbelieve.com/es/ayuda)

## Crisis
If someone is in crisis or considering self-harm, Declare never generates content —
it routes to trained human help first: call or text 988 (US Suicide & Crisis
Lifeline) or 911 for emergencies. [Find help now](https://declareandbelieve.com/crisis)

- [FAQ](https://declareandbelieve.com/faq) · [Privacy](https://declareandbelieve.com/privacy) · [Terms](https://declareandbelieve.com/terms) · [Cookies](https://declareandbelieve.com/cookies)
- Contact: support@declareandbelieve.com
- Publisher: JC Kingdom Ventures, LLC — a Kingdom-minded company building tools that
  help believers walk in their true identity in Christ.
- Sitemap: https://declareandbelieve.com/sitemap.xml
